description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Any operational or other expenses incurred by a Prime and paid directly by Sky after July 1, 2025 shall be treated as an advance against the Prime’s Genesis Capital Allocation. The total amount of such expenses shall be documented and shall be deducted from the Prime’s allocated capital funds at the time of the Capital Transfer (as outlined in [A.2.
